title: Routines
description: Scheduled prompts for a Houston agent.

prompt.description: Prompt sent to Claude when the routine fires.

suppress_when_silent.description: If true, runs that respond ROUTINE_OK are silent.

chat_mode.description: Whether each run reuses one chat ('shared', the default) or starts a fresh chat per run ('per_run').

integrations.description: Composio toolkit slugs this routine uses (e.g. ['gmail', 'slack']).

provider.description: Provider id override (e.g. 'anthropic', 'openai'); null means inherit the agent's provider.

model.description: Model override (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-8', 'gpt-5.5'); null means inherit the agent's model.

effort.description: Reasoning-effort override (e.g. 'high', 'max'); validated per-provider at dispatch; null means inherit the agent's effort.
